name: at-risk-triage
description: At-risk triage scoped to user's own book, with P0/P1/P2 prioritisation and concrete next-step per account.
input_message: Which of my accounts are at risk right now and why?
expected_behavior: Resolves 'my' as USR-101 without asking. Calls at-risk-signals scoped to owner_user_id=USR-101. Per skill rules: pulls account list, then for each account fans out to cases + open opps. Scores P0 (Red + open P1 OR renewal <30d with prob <50%), P1 (Red OR open P1 OR renewal <60d with prob <70%), P2 (Yellow with renewal <120d). Output ordered P0 → P1 → P2. Each entry names the account, gives the reason directly (no softening), and ends with one concrete suggestion tied to data. Says 'no at-risk accounts' explicitly if the book is healthy.
